data.title: Reperio Health & Amazon One Medical partner for at-home health screening with instant results, linking to One Medical membership.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, a partnership between Reperio Health and Amazon One Medical has been established to combine at-home health screenings with proactive healthcare. Individuals who undergo Reperio's unique preventive screening, providing instant results, will now be granted a One Medical membership. This collaboration aims to offer a seamless transition from early detection to continuous primary medical care. This partnership comes at a crucial time as numerous chronic conditions continue to impact individuals.

data.title: Brunswick Corporation announces Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings; detailed release on website.
data.description: Brunswick Corporation (NYSE: BC) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025 in Mettawa, Illinois on January 29, 2026. The company's detailed financial results press release can be accessed on its official website at https://ir.brunswick.com. Additionally, the results will be published on the SEC's website through the Form 8-K filing.

data.title: Royal Caribbean Group to build new Discovery Class ships in France at Chantiers de l'Atlantique shipyard. Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) revealed a set of contracts with the Chantiers de l'Atlantique shipyard in Saint Nazaire, France on Jan. 29, 2026. These agreements serve to ensure the building of the upcoming Discovery Class vessels.

data.title: FDA qualifies MolecuLightDX wound measurement tool as a Medical Device Development Tool for wound care products evaluation.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Pittsburgh, a company known as MolecuLight revealed that the MolecuLightDX® wound measurement tool has received qualification from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) as a Medical Device Development Tool (MDDT). This program by the FDA is designed to identify validated medical tools, with this initiative aiming to enhance the quality and accuracy of medical devices.

data.title: Solana validators decrease by 68% due to high costs, forcing smaller operators offline in 2023.
data.description: Since 2023, the number of validators on Solana has decreased by 68% due to increasing costs and competition from providers offering zero fees. This has resulted in smaller node operators being forced offline.

data.title: Global sports nutrition market to reach $108.1 billion by 2035 with a CAGR of 7.55%. Rising fitness trends drive growth.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in New York, it was reported that the Global Sports Nutrition Market is undergoing significant changes due to a rising global interest in physical fitness and performance-based nutrition. This trend is driven by the growing number of people engaging in sports and fitness activities globally. The market is seeing a surge in demand for sports nutrition products as consumers focus more on leading active lifestyles.

data.title: Euna Solutions opens new US headquarters in Atlanta, celebrated with ribbon-cutting in Sandy Springs on Jan 28.
data.description: Euna Solutions®, a prominent provider of cloud solutions for the public sector, in collaboration with Sandy Springs, Georgia, the sixth-largest city in northern Fulton County, have revealed the inauguration of Euna's new U.S. headquarters in the Atlanta metro area. The significant event took place on January 28 and was celebrated with a ribbon-cutting ceremony at the freshly refurbished office located at 1155 Perimeter Center West. Euna Solutions CEO Tom Amburgey was accompanied by representatives from Sandy Springs for this momentous occasion.

data.title: EDITED launches AI-powered workflows for quick insights in retail decisions, reducing time to value.
data.description: In the bustling cities of New York and London, EDITED has unveiled groundbreaking AI-driven guided workflows designed to swiftly identify top insights. These innovative tools streamline processes, reducing the time to achieve value and facilitating more informed decision-making.
